message:
chore(beads): sync issues.jsonl to reflect closed work

Beads issue tracker JSONL update reflecting recent issues that have
been closed or had comments appended in this session. JSONL is the
local-first source of truth for the beads issue store and is synced
to git per project convention; the .db is reconstructed from this
file. No code, schema, or workflow changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
